merged_events.event_description: The American Embassy in Zagreb was opened with Ronald Nietzke as Chargé d'Affaires ad interim.

evidence.quote: The American Embassy in Zagreb was opened on August 25, 1992, with Ronald Nietzke as Chargé d'Affaires ad interim.

merged_events.event_description: First U.S. Ambassador to Croatia, Peter W Galbraith, presented credentials, confirming full ambassadorial-level embassy representation.

evidence.quote: Peter W Galbraith, Ambassador Extraordinary and Plenipotentiary. Appointed: 1993-06-17. Credentials presented: 1993-06-28. Left post on 1998-01-03.

matched.notes: Perfect match. Both record the opening of the American Embassy in Zagreb on 1992-08-25.
